Meaning.En: Having consumed too much alcohol; intoxicated.
Meaning.Example: He was drunk and stumbled home at 2 a.m.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả trạng thái người vừa uống nhiều rượu bia, mất kiểm soát hành vi.
Situation.En: Describes someone who has consumed excessive alcohol and shows impaired coordination or judgment.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống cảnh sát giao thông phát hiện tài xế đang say xỉn.
Situation.En: A traffic police officer stops a driver suspected of being under the influence of alcohol.

Meaning.En: Extremely enthusiastic or captivated by something; overwhelmed with emotion.
Meaning.Example: She was drunk on the success of her first album.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả cảm giác hân hoan, phấn khích tột độ sau thành công.
Situation.En: Describes an intense feeling of euphoria and excitement following a major achievement.
